# fcs_images (Data Source)

The VM image catalog approved for environments (GET /v1/images). Every listed name is a valid `image` for fcs_vm.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) Available images. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable name (may be null).
- `name` (String) Catalog name; valid as fcs_vm image.
- `source` (String) catalog (standard image catalog) | env (operator allowlist).
